zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Beaumetz於1255年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯波奧梅-利斯-洛格斯時，她的父親Gilles III de Beaumetz25歲，母親Janne De Beauvoir15歲。她於1277年12月與Jean Ier De Picquigny在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯波奧梅-利斯-洛格斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Beaumetz于1255年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯波奧梅-利斯-洛格斯时，她的父亲Gilles III de Beaumetz25岁，母亲Janne De Beauvoir15岁。她于1277年12月与Jean Ier De Picquigny在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯波奧梅-利斯-洛格斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在法国皮卡迪索姆皮易尼享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Beaumetz was born in 1255, in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Gilles III de Beaumetz, was 25 and her mother, Janne De Beauvoir, was 15. She married Jean Ier De Picquigny in December 1277, in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1350, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Beaumetz est née en 1255, à Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Gilles III de Beaumetz, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Janne De Beauvoir, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Jean Ier De Picquigny en décembre 1277, à Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Beaumetz 1255 in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilles III de Beaumetz 25 und ihre Mutter Janne De Beauvoir 15. Sie hat im Dezember 1277 in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Jean Ier De Picquigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Beaumetz è nata il nel 1255 nel Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Gilles III de Beaumetz, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Janne De Beauvoir, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Jean Ier De Picquigny nel dicembre 1277, nel Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1350, nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Beaumetzが1255年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスビーウメトズ-ルeス-ロジェズで生まれた時，父Gilles III de Beaumetzは25歳，母Janne De Beauvoirは15歳であった。1277年12月にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスビーウメトズ-ルeス-ロジェズでJean Ier De Picquignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年にフランスピカーディソンメピククイグニーで95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Beaumetz(이)가 1255년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 보멧즈-e스-로그스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilles III de Beaumetz(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janne De Beauvoir(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1277년 12월 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 보멧즈-e스-로그스에서 Jean Ier De Picquigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Beaumetz nasceu em 1255, em Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Gilles III de Beaumetz, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Janne De Beauvoir, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean Ier De Picquigny em dezembro de 1277, em Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, França, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Beaumetz родилась в 1255 г. в местности бомец-лeс-логесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Gilles III de Beaumetz было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Janne De Beauvoir, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean Ier De Picquigny декабрь 1277 г. в местности бомец-лeс-логесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Beaumetz nació en 1255, en Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gilles III de Beaumetz, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Janne De Beauvoir, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Jean Ier De Picquigny en diciembre de 1277, en Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1350, en Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 95 años.
